name: Standing Right Hand Visible
prompt_fragment: The final catalog scene presents the model standing with the handbag placed near the right hand.
camera_motion: locked editorial camera with a gentle push-in
product_interaction: product is intended to sit near the relaxed right hand after compositing
composition_space_hint: clear placement area beside the right leg and right hip
occlusion_hint: right hand visible, relaxed fingers, no object currently held
hero_action_prompt_fragment: adult editorial model standing in a relaxed pose with right hand visible near the right hip, empty hands, clean side silhouette, clear placement area beside the right leg
hero_pose_intent: stable standing pose with visible right hand and clear side placement zone

notes: Manual anchor for empty-hand standing pose.
Places handbag near right hand/right hip area.
Raised and slightly reduced anchor for empty-hand standing pose.
Preferred default for transparent product alpha asset.
Places a smaller handbag closer to the right hip midpoint.
Lower hip placement for comparison against v2.
